---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem To Solve

Describe the operational problem or user need.

## Who Benefits

- M&E / MEAL teams
- Field coordinators or case workers
- Program leadership
- Researchers or public-good stewards
- Developers / maintainers

## Proposed Change

Describe the proposed improvement.

## Why It Matters

Explain why this would improve safety, usability, interoperability, evidence quality, or public-good maintainability.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds.

## Additional Context

Include links, screenshots, or implementation notes if helpful.
